product.name: Nescafe 3 in 1 Instant Coffee - Original (Less Sugar)
Nescafe 3 in 1 Instant Coffee - Original (Less Sugar)

metaData.Ingredients:
Sugar, Creamer [Glucose Syrup, Hydrogenated Palm Kernel Oil, Stabilizers (E340ii, E451i, E452i, E331iii), Sodium Caseinate (Milk Protein), Emulsifiers, Anticaking Agent (E551), Salt, Flavourings], Instant Coffee, Skimmed Milk Powder (Cow's Milk), Resistant Dextrin, Brown Sugar, Salt, Flavourings
• Allergen information: Contains milk
metaData.Key Information: Only the finest beans are selected for every great tasting cup of Nescafe Original. Coupled with a signature coffee aroma, enjoy a perfectly balanced cup of Nescafe Original 3in1, now with brown sugar.
metaData.Preparation: Add 180ml of hot water and give it a good stir

product.name: Nescafe 3 in 1 Instant Coffee - Original (Brown Sugar)

metaData.Ingredients:
Sugar, Glucose Syrup, Instant Coffee (9.2%), Hydrogenated Coconut Oil, Stabilisers (INS 340ii, INS 452I), Sodium Caseinate (from Milk), Emulsifiers (INS 471, INS 481i) and Anticaking agent (INS 551)
• Contains: Stabilisers, emulsifiers and anticaking agent as permitted food conditioners of synthetic or plant origin.
metaData.Key Information: A cup of SUPER coffee will make your day a much better one. Being a pioneer of 3in1 coffee, having to master balance between the right ingredients together to create a harmony of taste, aroma and texture. The signature original blend as been the staple range since the very beginning. Blended using the finest coffee beans with top grade sugar and non-dairy creamer, SUPER Original gives you that well-balanced taste and robust aroma that you love.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place

metaData.Ingredients: Sugar, Non-Dairy Creamer [Glucose Syrup, Hardened Vegetable Fat, Sodium Caseinate (contains Milk Protein), Stabiliser (E452II, E340II) and Emulsifier (Non-Animal Origin)(E471), Anti-Caking Agent (E554), Colour (160B)], Indocafe Instant Coffee
metaData.Preparation:
• Hot:
Pour 150ml of hot water (80°C)
• Cold:
75ml of iced water (50°C)

metaData.Ingredients:
Non-dairy Creamer (Glucose Syrup, Vegetable Fat [Palm, Coconut], Stabilizer [E340ii, E452i], Sodium Caseinate [Milk Protein], Acidity Regulator [e332i], Emulsifier [E471, E472e], Anticaking Agent [E551]), Rock Sugar & Instant White Coffee
• Contains stabilliser, acidity regulator, emulsifier and anticaking agent as permitted food conditioner
metaData.Key Information: Finely roasted high grade coffee beans meticulously brewed to perfection and carefully blended with quality creamer to capture all the robust aroma, a richer taste, creamier and more satisfying. With rock sugar and contains no added artificial coffee flavouring.
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. Pour content into cup
2. Add 200ml of hot water
3. Stir and serve
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place

offers.description: Buy 1 Indocafe 3 in 1 Instant Coffee Mix @ $13.95

product.description:
• Savor the original taste of local tradition with FairPrice 3 in 1 Coffee Original.
• Enjoy a comforting Singaporean experience and an aromatic cup of full-bodied coffee to start your day right.

metaData.Ingredients:
Creamer {Glucose Syrup, Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil (Palm Base), Sodium Caseinate (Contains Milk), Stabiliser [Ins340(Ii)], Sugar, Emulsifiers [E471, Ins481(I), E1450, E472E], Anti-Caking Agent (E551), Brown Sugar, Coffee Extract Powder, Thickener (Maltodextrin), Coffee Extract Powder (Contains Barley) and Synthetic Coffee Flavour [Maltodextrin, Thickener (E414), Natural Flavouring Substance, Synthetic Flavouring Substance, Emulsifier (E1518)].

Processed In A Facility That Also Processes Cereals Containing Gluten, Soybeans, Tree Nuts and Nuts Products.
metaData.Key Information:
• Naturally Trans Fat Free
• Naturally Cholesterol Free
metaData.Preparation: Pour 1 stick of 3 In 1 Coffee Mix (18g) into a cup. Add 150ml of hot water (90°C) & stir well.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry place, away from direct heat and sunlight.

product.name: FairPrice 3-In-1 Coffee - Original

metaData.Ingredients:
Sugar, Non-Dairy Creamer, (Glucose Syrup Solids, Hydrogenated Vegetable Fat, Sodium Caseinate, Emulsifier, Stabilizer and Silicon Dioxide), Instant Coffee, Permitted Food Flavour, Emulsifier and Permitted Acidity Regulator - Sodium Bicarbonate
• The product contains traces of milk products
metaData.Key Information: OWL Regular Low Fat Instant 3in1 Coffee is a convenient cup of instant coffee with an authentic local taste inspired by the Straits Asian coffee heritage, created by carefully blending coffee, non dairy creamer and sugar. Enjoy the convenience of this 3in1 with a traditionally stronger taste. Made with a blend of spray-dried coffee, non-diary creamer and sugar that is smooth and easy on palate.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Add 150ml of warm water (80°C)
2. Stir well and serve
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place

metaData.Ingredients:

• Contains stabilliser, acidity regulator, emulsifier and anticaking agent as permitted food conditioner
metaData.Key Information: Finely roasted high grade coffee beans meticulously brewed to perfection and carefully blended with quality creamer to capture all the robust aroma, a richer taste, creamier and more satisfying. With rock sugar and contains no added artificial coffee flavouring.
